positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed circular mandala design featuring interwoven exotic flora and cosmic celestial elements. Include glowing bioluminescent flowers, stardust trails, crescent moons, and stylized constellations that form a repeating pattern. The composition must be centralized and highly defined, suitable for an apparel print. Use a rich, deep color palette of indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and glowing iridescent gold. The style should be a harmonious blend of Art Nouveau linework, intricate etching, and ethereal fantasy illustration. Strong contrast, clean silhouettes, maximal detail, vector art quality, studio lighting.
negative: blur, artifact, noise, text, watermark, signature, low detail, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, blurry, distorted, grainy, monochrome
